---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement to the skill, docs, or release flow
labels: enhancement
---

## What do you want to improve

Describe the missing capability or the friction point.

## Why it matters

Explain what becomes easier, clearer, or safer if this is added.

## Proposed shape

If you already have an idea, describe the desired behavior, wording, or workflow.

## Example input

If this request is about skill behavior, include a representative raw question.

## Boundaries

What should this explicitly not do?
